payload.description:
## Problem
Users still report the Optimizer Metrics chart renders as blank except legend/squares.

## Behavior Spec
Feature: Optimizer Metrics chart rendering
Scenario: Render chart with cycle data
Given the procedure has recent/regression metrics
When the chart is shown
Then axes, grid, labels, and metric lines/dots are visible
And legend-only rendering does not occur.
payload.title: Optimizer Metrics chart blank on ProcedureTask (lines/axes/grid disappear)
